  1. NL: node.xmr.cz:18081

  4. DE (Bochum): node3.xmr.cz:18081
  5. DE (Frankfurt): node4.xmr.cz:18081

Web based (light wallet):
MyMonero
RINO - non-custodial

Mobile:
Monerujo: Android
Android (Cake Wallet)
Android (MyMonero)
iOS (Cake Wallet)
iOS (Edge Wallet)
Stack Wallet (open-source, Android/iOS, multicoin)
Stack Duo (fully open source cryptocurrency wallet. It is a fork of Stack Wallet, but stripped down to just Bitcoin and Monero.)

Kastelo
Trezor Model T / Trezor Safe 3
Nano S / Nano S Plus / Nano X
